channel.title: Case Study: Migrating Aleteia to Frontity
channel.description:
[Aleteia](https://aleteia.org/) is an online Catholic publication launched in 2013 and currently distributed in seven languages. With more than 13 million unique visitors and 40 million page views per month, it is the most popular Catholic website in the world.
They wanted a modern frontend stack to gain flexibility and provide a greater overall web experience.
Check out our latest case study to learn how **Frontity allowed Aleteia to migrate seven websites and accomplished their goals in just a couple of months**. 👇
https://frontity.org/blog/case-study-migrating-aleteia-to-frontity/

item.title: Case Study: Migrating Aleteia to Frontity
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Aleteia is an online Catholic publication launched in 2013 and currently distributed in seven languages. With more than 13 million unique visitors and 40 million page views per month, it is the most popular Catholic website in the world.

They wanted a modern frontend stack to gain flexibility and provide a greater overall web experience.

Check out our latest case study to learn how Frontity allowed Aleteia to migrate seven websites and accomplished their goals in just a couple of months.

Frontity – 23 Feb 21

Case Study: Migrating Aleteia to Frontity

Aleteia is the leading website for Catholic news. In just a couple of months, they managed to migrate seven websites to Frontity and pave the way for a seamless news experience.

Read full topic
item.source: Case Study: Migrating Aleteia to Frontity
